label: Reasoning
description: Extended chain-of-thought via the platform's Smart Router. Forces enableThinking:true at max quality (sliderPosition:100). Use for hard problems.

settings.name: modelOverride
settings.label: Model override
settings.description: Leave blank to use Smart Router (auto). Hard-coded model IDs are discouraged.

ai.shortDescription: Extended chain-of-thought reasoning via Smart Router (max quality).
ai.whenToUse: Hard analytical / multi-step problems where you want explicit thinking + max model quality.
ai.examplePrompt: use the reasoning node to derive root cause from these stack traces
ai.promptHints: Reference the answer with {{steps.<id>.content}} and the trace with {{steps.<id>.thinking}}.
